psalm-72-1.verse: Give the king Your judgments, O God, And Your righteousness to the king’s son.
psalm-72-1.prayer: Lord, give me wisdom to value justice and righteousness. Teach me to make decisions that honor You and reflect Your truth.

psalm-72-2.verse: May he judge Your people with righteousness And Your afflicted with justice.
psalm-72-2.prayer: Father, help me care about justice for all people. Let my actions reflect fairness, compassion, and righteousness.

psalm-72-3.verse: Let the mountains bring peace to the people, And the hills, in righteousness.
psalm-72-3.prayer: Lord, let peace and righteousness grow in my life. Make my heart a place where Your goodness is welcomed and seen.

psalm-72-4.verse: May he vindicate the afflicted of the people, Save the children of the needy And crush the oppressor.
psalm-72-4.prayer: Father, defend the weak, the needy, and those who are oppressed. Use my life to reflect Your compassion and care.

psalm-72-5.verse: Let them fear You while the sun endures, And as long as the moon, throughout all generations.
psalm-72-5.prayer: Lord, teach me to live with reverence for You from generation to generation. Let my faithfulness point others toward Your name.

psalm-72-6.verse: May he come down like rain upon the mown grass, Like showers that water the earth.
psalm-72-6.prayer: Father, let Your presence refresh my soul like rain on dry ground. Bring renewal, peace, and life where I feel weary.

psalm-72-7.verse: In his days may the righteous flourish, And abundance of peace till the moon is no more.
psalm-72-7.prayer: Lord, let righteousness flourish and peace increase in my life. Help me walk in Your ways with a steady and faithful heart.

psalm-72-8.verse: May he also rule from sea to sea And from the River to the ends of the earth.
psalm-72-8.prayer: Father, You reign over all. Help me trust Your authority and surrender every area of my life to Your rule.

psalm-72-9.verse: Let the nomads of the desert bow before him, And his enemies lick the dust.
psalm-72-9.prayer: Lord, every power and every enemy must bow before You. Help me remember that nothing is greater than Your authority.

psalm-72-10.verse: Let the kings of Tarshish and of the islands bring presents; The kings of Sheba and Seba offer gifts.
psalm-72-10.prayer: Father, may people from every place bring honor to You. Let my life also offer worship, gratitude, and devotion.

psalm-72-11.verse: And let all kings bow down before him, All nations serve him.
psalm-72-11.prayer: Lord, You are worthy of worship from every nation and every heart. Help me honor You as King over all.

psalm-72-12.verse: For he will deliver the needy when he cries for help, The afflicted also, and him who has no helper.
psalm-72-12.prayer: Father, thank You for hearing the needy and rescuing those who have no helper. Make me attentive to those who are hurting.

psalm-72-13.verse: He will have compassion on the poor and needy, And the lives of the needy he will save.
psalm-72-13.prayer: Lord, give me compassion for the poor and weak. Help me care about the lives of those who need mercy and protection.

psalm-72-14.verse: He will rescue their life from oppression and violence, And their blood will be precious in his sight;
psalm-72-14.prayer: Father, redeem people from oppression and violence. Teach me to value every life as precious in Your sight.

psalm-72-15.verse: So may he live, and may the gold of Sheba be given to him; And let them pray for him continually; Let them bless him all day long.
psalm-72-15.prayer: Lord, may my life continually bless and honor You. Let prayer, praise, and gratitude remain alive in my heart each day.

psalm-72-16.verse: May there be abundance of grain in the earth on top of the mountains; Its fruit will wave like the cedars of Lebanon; And may those from the city flourish like vegetation of the earth.
psalm-72-16.prayer: Father, let Your blessing produce fruitfulness in every area of my life. Help what You plant in me grow for Your glory.

psalm-72-17.verse: May his name endure forever; May his name increase as long as the sun shines; And let men bless themselves by him; Let all nations call him blessed.
psalm-72-17.prayer: Lord, may Your name endure forever and Your blessing reach every generation. Use my life to point others toward Your goodness.

psalm-72-18.verse: Blessed be the Lord God, the God of Israel, Who alone works wonders.
psalm-72-18.prayer: Father, blessed are You, the God who alone works wonders. Help me remember Your power and praise You for all You do.

psalm-72-19.verse: And blessed be His glorious name forever; And may the whole earth be filled with His glory. Amen, and Amen.
psalm-72-19.prayer: Lord, blessed be Your glorious name forever. Let the whole earth be filled with Your glory, and let my life join in that praise.

psalm-72-20.verse: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.
psalm-72-20.prayer: Father, thank You for faithful prayers that point generations toward You. Help my prayers and my life honor You to the end.

psalm-72-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your righteousness, justice, compassion, and glory. Teach me to care for the weak, defend what is right, and walk humbly under Your authority. Let peace and righteousness flourish in my heart, and let my life point others toward Your eternal kingdom. May Your name be blessed forever, and may the whole earth be filled with Your glory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-72-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your righteousness, justice, compassion, and glory. Teach me to care for the weak, defend what is right, and walk humbly under Your authority. Let peace and righteousness flourish in my heart, and let my life point others toward Your eternal kingdom. May Your name be blessed forever, and may the whole earth be filled with Your glory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
